content:
Weekly Pulse Summary

1. Trading Experience Issues
2. order processing is very bad the set target or stop-loss everytime gives loss
3. Product development should focus on resolving the order processing and trading issues to prevent losses and improve the overall user experience.

1. High Brokerage Charges
2. brokerage charge ka samjh nhi aata hai kabhi 14 rupees to kabhi 20 aur kabhi 35 kat leta hai aur extra charge bhi bahut hai aise me beginner ke liye ye aap thik nhi hai agar brokerage charge fix ho to app thik hai nhi to sabse bekar app hai
3. The product team should consider revising the brokerage charge structure to make it more transparent and fixed to alleviate user concerns and improve overall user experience.
